markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content workflow, review format, and holiday schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX will now deliver full Google Docs for review, replacing JSON files. This enables consistent reviews and sharing with external stakeholders (e.g., OpenAI).](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:** No new content will be delivered the week of Dec 29. GrowthX will send all content for that week in advance, before Christmas.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Content Hold:** The `character.ai` page is on hold due to negative press. GrowthX will investigate if a replacement is available from its 70-company pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Stripe Acquisition:** Metronome is operating "business as usual" while the deal is pending. GrowthX will be notified if messaging changes are required.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow & Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The previous JSON-only delivery format was inefficient for review, making it difficult to track updates and share content with external stakeholders like OpenAI.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will now deliver full Google Docs for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides a single source of truth, enabling consistent reviews and easier sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Format:** Each doc will contain the main content and the "Metronome's take," potentially on separate tabs.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**New Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [**Mondays/Tuesdays:** GrowthX sends a Slack update on the week's work.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [**Fridays:** GrowthX sends a Slack roundup with links to all completed documents.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Content Pipeline & Categorization

  - [**Tagging:** Will will sync with Chris on content categorization, which directly informs the tagging requirements GrowthX needs to implement.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Airtable Update:** GrowthX is creating a new Airtable tab for companies with \>2 products, as these require a different publishing process. Katya will provide a Loom walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Content Hold: `character.ai`

  - [**Issue:** A recent 60 Minutes segment painted `character.ai` in a negative light, creating a sensitivity risk.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Decision:** The `character.ai` page will be held from publication.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will investigate if a replacement is available from its 70-company pipeline. If not, Metronome will provide a new company.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

### Stripe Acquisition

  - [**Status:** The deal is not yet finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [**Guidance:** Metronome is operating "business as usual."](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [**Action:** Metronome will notify GrowthX if messaging changes are required post-acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Deliver 7 revised articles in Google Doc format by EOW (target: Thursday).](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Clarify the source of the 70-company content pipeline with Matthew by mid-week.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [Notify Metronome when the new Airtable tab is ready and provide a Loom walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Metronome:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Sync with Chris on content categorization and tagging requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/Q3seYkosup4fAjZ2M8sMAr2y8jgLP3sT?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
